street.description: Street or way the turning traffic is on; may be a named driveway or parking-lot way (e.g. 'Peirce Elementary School Parking Lot', 'Williams School driveway')

direction.description: Approach direction of travel on `street`; empty when the source states none. Normalize 'easterly'/'northerly' etc. to the vocabulary; 'for Xbound vehicles' supplies X

cross_street.description: Named street or way the prohibited left turn would enter ('onto X'), or the street at which the turn is prohibited in the restatement grammar ('at X'). Named streets/ways only — driveways and parking facilities go in `destination`. Carriageway designations stay intact (e.g. 'Commonwealth Avenue, North Drive')

cross_street_direction.description: Direction of travel onto the receiving street when the source states one, whether inline ('onto Watertown Street eastbound') or trailing ('onto Waltham Street, eastbound.'); empty when not stated

destination.description: Non-street destination the prohibited turn would enter ('into X'): a driveway, parking area, or parking lot, as named in the source with leading article dropped (e.g. 'driveway of 1900 Commonwealth Avenue', 'Newton Centre municipal parking area'); empty when the turn target is a named street

days.description: Days the prohibition applies; empty means at all times (or see schedule_detail)

times.description: Time window(s) the prohibition applies; empty means at all times (or see schedule_detail)

schedule_detail.description: Compound schedule with different times on different days, which one days+times pair cannot express. Semicolon-joined clauses of 'DAYS TIMES' using the common day tokens and 24-hour ranges. When used, days and times stay empty

exceptions.description: Vehicles exempt from the prohibition, lowercase without parentheses (e.g. 'bicycles' from '(except bicycles)')

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier from the source (e.g. 'opposite Elm Street', 'eastern leg', 'at the entrance to the Massachusetts Turnpike', 'at the southernmost intersection of Nahanton Street and Dedham Street')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
